djs: Allows guild members to view a channel, which includes
reading messages in text channels and joining voice channels

MANAGE_CHANNELS.djs: Allows management and editing of channels

MANAGE_ROLES.djs: Allows management and editing of roles

djs: Allows for creating emojis, stickers, and soundboard sounds
and editing and deleting those created by the current user
Allows for editing and deleting emojis, stickers and soundboard
sounds created by all users

VIEW_AUDIT_LOG.djs: Allows for viewing of audit logs

MANAGE_WEBHOOKS.djs: Allows management and editing of webhooks

MANAGE_GUILD.djs: Allows management and editing of the guild

CHANGE_NICKNAME.djs: Allows for modification of own nickname

MANAGE_NICKNAMES.djs: Allows for modification of other users nicknames

djs: Allows for timing out users to prevent them from sending or
reacting to messages in chat and threads, and from speaking in
voice and stage channels
Allows for sending messages in a channel and creating
threads in a forum (does not allow sending messages in threads)

SEND_MESSAGES_IN_THREADS.djs: Allows for sending messages in threads
SEND_MESSAGES_IN_THREADS.mobile: Send Messages in Threads and Posts

CREATE_PUBLIC_THREADS.djs: Allows for creating public and announcement threads

djs: Links sent by users with this permission will be auto-embedded

ATTACH_FILES.djs: Allows for uploading images and files

djs: Allows for adding new reactions to messages. This permission
does not apply to reacting with an existing reaction on a message.

USE_EXTERNAL_EMOJIS.djs: Allows the usage of custom emojis from other servers

USE_EXTERNAL_STICKERS.djs: Allows the usage of custom stickers from other servers

djs: Allows for using the @everyone tag to notify all users in
a channel, and the @here tag to notify all online users in
a channel

MANAGE_MESSAGES.djs: Allows for deletion of other users messages

PIN_MESSAGES.djs: Allows pinning and unpinning of messages

djs: Allows for deleting and archiving treads and viewing all
private threads

READ_MESSAGE_HISTORY.djs: Allows for reading of message history

CONNECT.djs: Allows for joining of a voice channel

SPEAK.djs: Allows for speaking in a voice channel

STREAM.djs: Allows the user to go live

USE_SOUNDBOARD.djs: Allows for using soundboard in a channel

djs: Allows the usage of custom soundboard sounds from other servers
Allows for using voice-activity-detection in a voice channel

PRIORITY_SPEAKER.djs: Allows for using priority speaker in a voice channel

MUTE_MEMBERS.djs: Allows for muting members in a voice channel

DEAFEN_MEMBERS.djs: Allows for deafening of members in a voice channel

MOVE_MEMBERS.djs: Allows for moving of members between voice channels

djs: Allows members to use application commands,
including slash commands and context menu commands
Allows for using Activities (applications with the EMBEDDED flag)
Allows user-installed apps to send public responses.
When disabled, users will still be allows to use their apps
but the responses will be ephemeral.
This only applies to apps not also installed to the server.

REQUEST_TO_SPEAK.djs: Allows for reaquesting to speak in stage channels

djs: Allows for creating scheduled events, and editing and deleting
those created by the current user
Allows for editing and deleting scheduled events created by
all users
Allows all permissions and bypasses channel permission overwrites

VIEW_CREATOR_MONETIZATION_ANALYTICS.djs: Allows for viewing role subscription insights
